word: H7436 - רָמָתַיִם צֹופִים - Râmâthayim Tsôwphîym - raw-maw-thah'-yim tso-feem' - Ramathaimzophim

sections.paragraph:
Original: רמתים צופים

Transliteration: râmâthayim tsôphı̂ym

Phonetic: raw-maw-thah'-yim tso-feem'

BDB Definition:

Ramathaim-zophim = "double height of the watchers"
  1. the home place of Samuel located in the hill country of Ephraim

Origin: from the dual of H7413 and the plural of the act part of H6822

TWOT entry: pr n loc

Part(s) of speech:
